items.headline: Trump’s Iran Food Deal Could End Up Helping the Regime, Not Its People
items.quote_original: [REVIEW: paste the exact official quote here]
items.excerpt: The Trump administration wants to release frozen Iranian funds—but only to buy U.S. farm goods. The proposal is less humanitarian gesture than market engineering, and without independent oversight, it risks repeating the catastrophic failures of the Iraq Oil-for-Food program.
